name: Ecommerce Back View
commercial_use: Product page gallery, fit reference, marketplace listing
visual_goal: Show the back fit, seams, length, and silhouette with minimal styling noise.
composition: Full-body back-facing frame on a plain studio background.
model_direction: Stand straight with natural posture, arms slightly away from the body if needed.
styling_notes: Hair should not cover important back details; garment hem and seams should be visible.
lighting: Even studio lighting with enough side definition to show shape.
camera_language: 70mm lens look, eye-level camera, neutral ecommerce perspective.
prompt: Clean ecommerce fashion photograph of a model wearing the featured garment from the back view, full-body studio composition, plain background, even lighting, accurate fit and silhouette, clear seams and garment length.
negative_prompt: twisted posture, hidden back details, wrinkled garment, uneven hem, dramatic shadows, distracting styling
